zh.title: 法蒂玛预言全集 - 圣母玛利亚的三个秘密与太阳奇迹 | Fatima Prophecies
zh.description: 1917年葡萄牙法蒂玛圣母显灵事件完整记录。三位牧童目睹圣母六次显现，传达三个秘密：地狱异象、二战预言与俄罗斯奉献、教会迫害预言。太阳奇迹有约7万人见证。
zh.keywords: 法蒂玛预言,法蒂玛圣母,三个秘密,太阳奇迹,露西亚,弗朗西斯科,雅辛塔,圣母显灵,Fatima prophecy,Our Lady of Fatima
zh.ogTitle: 法蒂玛预言全集 | Fatima Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 1917年法蒂玛圣母显灵的三个秘密完整记录与验证分析。太阳奇迹、二战预言、教会迫害预言。
zh.twitterDescription: 法蒂玛圣母的三个秘密与太阳奇迹。1917年葡萄牙三牧童见证圣母显灵，预言二战、冷战与教会迫害。

en.title: Fatima Prophecies - The Three Secrets of Our Lady of Fatima (1917) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Complete record of the 1917 Marian apparitions at Fatima, Portugal. Three shepherd children witnessed six apparitions of the Virgin Mary, who revealed three secrets: a vision of hell, WWII prediction and Russia's consecration, and the persecution of the Church. The Miracle of the Sun was witnessed by ~70,000 people.
en.keywords: Fatima prophecy,Our Lady of Fatima,Three Secrets,Miracle of the Sun,Lucia,Francisco,Jacinta,Marian apparitions,Fatima Portugal,Catholic prophecy
en.ogTitle: Fatima Prophecies - The Three Secrets of Our Lady of Fatima
en.ogDescription: Complete archive of the 1917 Fatima apparitions and the Three Secrets revealed to three shepherd children in Portugal. Includes verification against historical events.
en.twitterDescription: The Three Secrets of Fatima and the Miracle of the Sun. In 1917, three Portuguese children witnessed Marian apparitions predicting WWII, the Cold War, and persecution of the Church.
